mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_dispatch_dlq_log (trace_id, email, scene, retry_count, error_message, created_at) VALUES (#{traceId}, #{email}, #{scene}, #{retryCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, trace_id, email, scene, retry_count, error_message, created_at FROM email_dispatch_dlq_log WHERE (#{traceId} IS NULL OR #{traceId} = '' OR trace_id = #{traceId}) AND (#{email} IS NULL OR #{email} = '' OR email = #{email}) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
